claim_boundary: Locked exploratory solo term-contract ledger under taxonomy study-record v3 / method profile v2.
Not taxonomy adoption, mechanism evidence, product integration, or M1 completion.
Human accepted all provisional AI-drafted codes unchanged; 16 AMBIGUOUS challengeability cells retained.
storage_note: Locked exploratory ledger held under execution/work until a bootstrap-safe output-authorization attestation allows materialization at the planned-output locator. Not multi-rater validation; not taxonomy adoption.

reasons_not_support: 16 cells remain AMBIGUOUS (all CHECK-CHALLENGEABLE); support requires all five checks satisfied for all 33 terms.
Inter-rater reliability not estimable under solo method; confirmatory agreement/kappa thresholds cannot be satisfied.
Competency-question full answerability was not separately re-adjudicated as a closed term-contract sub-ledger.
